title: T-064 — Docs: TEC-014 Bulk Import CSV prototype gap brief
prompt: Write a UX-engineering brief for the missing TEC-014 'Bulk Import CSV' prototype (per §6.5 [NO-PROTOTYPE-YET] + audit BLOCKER row 4). Output: design/specs/TEC-014-bulk-import-csv.md describing the proposed 3-step wizard (upload → validate → diff preview → confirm), required field mappings (item_code, name, type, uom_base, weight_mode, allergens), and acceptance gates that must be met before a T3-ui task can be drafted. Cross-link to 02-SETTINGS Reference CRUD import patterns for consistency. Until prototype lands, the implementation T3-ui task is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1.

pipeline_inputs.description: Engineering brief unblocking TEC-014 prototype creation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Document the wizard steps, validation rules per row (V-TEC-01..04), CSV column contract, error reporting format. The brief sets the parity contract that a future prototype + T3-ui must meet.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief is written, when reviewed, then it lists CSV column contract, 3 wizard steps, and per-step validation rules covering V-TEC-01..04.
Given the brief, when an engineer reads it, then they have a clear list of acceptance gates that must be met before a T3-ui task can be drafted.
test_strategy: Manual review by Quality Lead + UX team.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement UI or API in this task.
Do not block other Phase 1 work on this brief.
